title: Grafana 12.2 — Logs JSON Viewer (Drilldown)
description: Shows off the 12.2 Logs Drilldown JSON viewer: pick any JSON log line and Grafana renders the structured attributes as a navigable tree. Lab input: Grafana's own JSON-formatted logs (GF_LOG_FORMAT=json).

options.content:
### Logs Drilldown JSON viewer (12.2)

- Click **[➡ Logs Drilldown](/a/grafana-lokiexplore-app)** for the full app experience (Fields → JSON → tree).
- The panel below keeps you on this dashboard and enables **log details** — click a line → *Parse JSON* to get the tree.

Grafana is configured with `GF_LOG_FORMAT=json` so every line here is structured.

panels.title: Grafana logs (json) — click a line → Parse JSON
